name: JellyFrame Feature Test
author: grimmdev
description: Tests every jf.* surface from server and browser. Shows a live results panel on all pages. For development use only.

vars.name: Test Variable
vars.description: A sample variable to verify jf.vars works. Set any value.

name: Now Playing
author: grimmdev
description: Shows what's currently playing across all active Jellyfin sessions as a live ticker in the header. Polls every 15 seconds and updates instantly on playback events. Requires the server mod for session data.

vars.name: Instance Label
vars.description: Label returned by the /sessions endpoint. Useful if you run multiple Jellyfin servers.

vars.name: Poll Interval (ms)
vars.description: How often the browser ticker refreshes session data. Default is 15000 (15 seconds). Minimum recommended: 5000.

vars.name: Show Username
vars.description: When enabled, the ticker also shows the username next to the currently playing title.

name: Media Bar
author: grimmdev
description: A featured content slideshow bar on the Jellyfin home page. Showcases backdrop images, logos, ratings, genres, and plot summaries for your media with auto-advancing slides, navigation arrows, and play/detail/favourite buttons. Configure a playlist ID for curated content or let it pick from your latest additions automatically.

vars.name: Playlist ID
vars.description: Jellyfin item ID of a playlist to use as the source for the bar. Leave blank to use the latest additions from your library.

vars.name: Manual Item IDs
vars.description: Comma-separated list of Jellyfin item IDs to feature. Ignored if Playlist ID is set.

vars.name: Number of Items
vars.description: How many items to show in the bar (1–20).

vars.name: Slide Interval (ms)
vars.description: How long each slide is shown before auto-advancing. Default is 8000 (8 seconds).

vars.name: Shuffle Items
vars.description: Randomise the order of items each time the bar loads.
